title: Dungeon Entrance
visual_description: Weathered stone fortress walls, an exposed courtyard or entrance path, wooden supply crates and barrels, conifer trees, and heavy dungeon gates.
text: Entrance visual profile: grey stone fortress entrance and courtyard with crates, barrels, trees, and dungeon gates.

title: Prisons
visual_description: Dark stone prison corridors with iron bars, cramped cells, chains, torture fixtures, and stained masonry.
text: Prisons visual profile: dark stone corridors, iron-barred cells, chains, and torture fixtures.
